§02 — Arcana Classification
IX — THE HERMIT
The Hermit
The Hermit walks alone, lantern raised against the dark. A seeker of inner truth, withdrawn from the noise of the world — not out of fear, but out of wisdom. Their solitude is not emptiness; it is the fertile silence where understanding grows. In the world, they are the quiet ones who see everything.
introspection solitude inner wisdom patience guidance
